analysis.name: dogwifhat
analysis.summary: WIF是Solana上的知名Meme币，近期因Upbit上线等消息刺激出现反弹，但当前在Cronos链上VVS Finance的流动性极低（仅1.3万美元），且价格较ATH跌超96%。基本面缺乏实质支撑，风险极高。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性改善、出现重大生态进展或主流CEX重新上线前，任何买入逻辑均不成立。

catalysts: Upbit上线消息（2026年5月）曾推动短期暴涨44%
Meme币社区情绪回暖可能带动反弹
Binance等大所仍有交易对，但已添加监控标签

latestNews.title: dogwifhat (WIF) Price Rebounds Into Key Supply Zone — Can Bulls Trigger a 30% Breakout?
latestNews.reason: 技术分析文章，指出价格进入阻力区，但未提供明确突破信号。

latestNews.title: Solana-Memecoin dogwifhat (WIF) ‘Rises From the Dead,’ Pops 30% on Upbit Listing News
latestNews.reason: Upbit上线是近期主要催化剂，但消息已过时（2026年5月），价格已回落。

latestNews.title: Binance Will Extend the Monitoring Tag to Include ... WIF
latestNews.reason: Binance将WIF列入监控标签，表明交易所对其风险关注，可能影响流动性。

fundamentals: Solana上的Meme币，无实际用途，完全社区驱动
总供应量约9.99亿枚，全流通，无解锁压力
市值约1.68亿美元（CoinGecko排名186），但Cronos链上仅10万美元
ATH为4.83美元，当前价格0.1688美元，跌幅96.5%
Binance已添加监控标签，Upbit上线后价格未能维持
marketRead: Cronos链上VVS Finance交易对24小时成交量仅613美元，流动性1.3万美元，极易被操纵
价格24小时涨3.73%，但7日涨13.3%，30日跌11.58%，整体处于下跌趋势
主流CEX（如Binance）仍有交易量，但监控标签可能抑制交易兴趣
risks: 流动性极低：Cronos链上交易对深度极差，大额买卖将导致严重滑点
Meme币无基本面支撑，价格完全依赖市场情绪
ATH跌幅超96%，上方套牢盘巨大，反弹空间有限
Binance监控标签可能进一步导致退市风险
Upbit利好已消化，缺乏新催化剂
watchlist: 是否有新的主流交易所上线或做市商支持
Solana链上WIF的流动性及交易量变化
sourceNotes: 数据主要来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，Cronos链上数据可能不反映全局
新闻来源包括CryptoRank、CCN等，部分为预测性内容
未获取到Solana链上DEX数据，可能更准确反映真实流动性

profile.name: dogwifhat
profile.description: dogwifhat (WIF) is a Solana-based memecoin featuring a Shiba Inu dog wearing a pink knitted hat that has become a central figure in the 2024-2026 market. Originally launched anonymously in late 2023, the project operates on a decentralized, community-driven model with no formal venture capital backing or complex tokenomics. It represents a cultural phenomenon on the Solana blockchain that celebrates whimsy and simplicity over technical complexity, focusing on its identity as a playful mascot for the digital finance era. The project’s main value proposition is its "Pure Meme Identity," as it maintains a strict focus on its meme origins without forced utility or a pivot toward DeFi and gaming. The project embodies the community-driven nature of the Solana ecosystem, prioritizing "vibes" and meme-sharing as its primary growth drivers. It follows a "hat stays on" philosophy, maintaining a singular focus on its core meme rather than building a complex ecosystem. While the project does not have a formal governance structure or DAO, decisions are largely driven by social consensus among the community and key influencers. Notable community initiatives include the "Sphere Wif Hat" campaign,
